slide1.title: We build products that don’t break when you scale.
slide1.description: We help companies turn ideas and existing systems into clean, maintainable products that keep working as they grow.

slide2.title: Most products fail not at launch — but during growth.
slide2.description: As products evolve, codebases become messy and slow. We design systems that stay clear, stable and easy to extend.

slide3.title: Clean systems, strong UX and products you can trust.
slide3.description: From interface to backend and automation, we build systems that are easy to maintain and confidently evolve.

about.title: A small team that builds products properly from the start.
about.text1: We focus on building products that don’t fall apart as they grow. Instead of rushing into code, we think through structure, flows and long-term maintainability.
about.text2: Our strength is the combination of product thinking and engineering discipline. We care about clean architecture, clarity and systems that stay stable over time.

craft.title: Product thinking
craft.description: We think beyond features — focusing on structure, flows and long-term product behavior.

delivery.title: Clean execution
delivery.description: We build systems that are readable, structured and easy to maintain.

stack.title: Built to scale
stack.description: We design products that grow without turning into technical debt.

services.title: We don’t just build features — we build systems that last.
services.subtitle: From structure to interface and automation, we focus on long-term product quality.

frontend.title: Product Interfaces
frontend.description: Interfaces that feel fast, clear and easy to use in real scenarios. Built for usability and consistency as products evolve.

backend.title: Product Architecture
backend.description: Backend systems and APIs designed to stay clean, understandable and scalable over time.

aiAgents.title: AI & Automation Layer
aiAgents.description: AI agents and automation flows that solve real business problems and reduce repetitive work.

technologies.title: Built with proven technologies
technologies.description: We use reliable tools that support scalability, clean architecture and long-term maintainability.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.paragraph1: TypeScript helps keep code predictable and easier to maintain as systems grow.
typescript.paragraph2: It allows teams to understand structure and data flow more clearly.
typescript.paragraph3: We use it to build reliable frontend and backend systems.
typescript.paragraph4: It improves confidence when evolving the product.

angular.title: Angular
angular.paragraph1: Angular helps build large, structured interfaces.
angular.paragraph2: It enforces consistency across the codebase.
angular.paragraph3: Useful for dashboards and internal tools.

react.title: React
react.paragraph1: React allows fast iteration and modular UI.
react.paragraph2: Strong ecosystem for building modern interfaces.
react.paragraph3: Used for SaaS, landing pages and apps.

reactNative.title: React Native
reactNative.paragraph1: Build mobile apps from one codebase.

portfolio.title: Examples of systems we build
portfolio.description: We build systems that support real operations and product growth.

crm.title: Custom CRM System
crm.description: Internal system to manage leads, clients and communication.

platform.title: Service Platform
platform.description: Product connecting marketing and customer actions.

mobile.title: Mobile Experience
mobile.description: Mobile interface for core product features.

contact.title: Tell us what you’re building
contact.description: Share your product or idea — we’ll suggest the most practical next step.
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: We build products that stay clean, scalable and reliable as they grow.
